description: Write latches take a Variable (Variable) as a global input, and the Variable will determine what SetValue (Generic) and ResetValue (Generic) will take as a value. The set and reset value inputs will never take different types from each other.

fields.Reset: Call this to set the value pointed to by Variable (Variable Generic) to the ResetValue (Generic) input.
fields.Set: Call this to set the value pointed to by Variable (Variable Generic) to the SetValue (Generic) input.
fields.SetValue: Value to write to the value pointed to by Variable (Variable Generic) upon calling Set (Call)
fields.ResetValue: Value to write to the value pointed to by Variable (Variable Generic) upon calling Reset (Call)
fields.OnSet: sends an impulse after SetValue (Call) has been impulsed and the value pointed to by Variable (Variable Generic) has been set to SetValue (Generic).
fields.OnReset: sends an impulse after ResetValue (Call) has been impulsed and the value pointed to by Variable (Variable Generic) has been set to ResetValue (Generic).
fields.OnFail: sends an impulse after either ResetValue (Call) or SetValue (Call) has been impulsed and the value wasn't able to be written due to a missing Variable (Variable Generic) Value.
